V-M-028.checks: Alembic migrations apply all migrations on clean database and produce schema consistent with models. Backward compatible with existing SQLModel.create_all behavior during transition period. Phase-29 MTProto assignment migration is registered after baseline with user/SNI uniqueness indexes. Phase-43 adds encrypted MTProto IP observations, admin alerts, and TTL IP block records. Phase-44 adds password reset token persistence after Phase-43. Phase-45 adds pending trial activation fields after Phase-44.
V-M-028.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_db_migrations.py -v

scenarios.scenario: alembic upgrade head applies all migrations on clean database
MTProto assignment migration follows baseline and contains registry schema markers
Phase-43 migration creates IP observation, admin alert, and blocked-IP record tables
Phase-44 migration creates password_reset_tokens after Phase-43
Phase-45 migration creates pending trial activation columns after Phase-44

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-14: tests/test_db_migrations.py passed as part of Phase-29 target pytest gate.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-20: tests/test_db_migrations.py passed in the Phase-43 backend wave and validates phase43_add_mtproto_ip_observability migration metadata.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-06-01: tests/test_db_migrations.py passed in Phase-44 backend suite and validates phase44_add_password_reset_tokens migration metadata.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-06-01: tests/test_db_migrations.py passed in Phase-45 backend suite and validates phase45_pending_trial_activation migration metadata plus runtime compatibility columns.

phase-69-verification-design.scope: Database migration verification for referral bonus state.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-1: If new columns/tables are required, migration must be reversible, deterministic, and safe on existing production rows.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-2: Migration tests must prove existing referrals, subscriptions, and pending trials still load correctly.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-3: Schema must support idempotency markers for paid-referral bonus processing.
phase-69-verification-design.commands: cd backend && pytest tests/test_db_migrations.py tests/test_referrals.py tests/test_trial_activation.py
